title: Tern - no charge case screens (Onboarding, Supported devices list)
scenario: Onboarding for Voyager Free 60 Charge Case shows no charge case screens when started from supported devices list
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure no Poly device is currently connected.
3. Tap the menu or option to open the supported devices list.
4. From the supported devices list, select "Voyager Free 60 Charge Case" (not the Free 60+ variant).
5. Tap to start the onboarding process for the selected device.
6. Observe the screens shown during the onboarding flow for the charge case.
expected: The onboarding flow should display dedicated charge case screens for the Voyager Free 60 Charge Case, guiding the user through setup of the smart charge case.
